titleStmt.title: SII 40.268: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 268. (A.R. No. B. 313 of 1933.) Mēḍikoṇḍūru, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab set up before the Hanumān temple.
This is dated Śaka 1240, Kāḷayukti, Āshāḍha, śu. 11, Monday, Saṅkrānti, corresponding to 1318 A.D., June 10. However the week day was Saturday.

Records the grant of income as per one vīsamu on one māḍa made to the god Prasanna-Gōpīnātha for providing services by the Eighteen communities (ashṭādaśa-praja) of the village Mēdikoṇḍūru for the merit of king Pratāparudra and Dēchaya-leṅka and of their parents.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1240 Agu
nēṁṭi kālayukti saṁvatsara Ā
ṣāḍha śu 11 sōnāṁḍu Ā yēṭi saṁkrāṁtti kā
lamunappuḍu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara kākati
yya pratāparudradēva mahārājulaku dha¨rmmaṁ
gānu dēcayaleṁkagāriki puṇyamugānu mēḍikō
ṁḍuri kāṁpulu Aṣṭādaśa prajalūnu tamatallidaṁḍrula
kuṁ buṇyamugānu śrī pracanna gōpinātha mahādē
vuniki tama Amubaḍini māḍapēranu vīsāmu lekka
nu dārāpū¨rvvakamugānu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkaṁgānu Istimi I
di ledu Anuvāṁḍu gaṁggakaṟuta kapilaṁ jaṁppina vā
ṁḍu peddakoḍku kāṭikapeṭṭinavāṁḍu paṁca
mahāpā cēsināṁḍu svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā
ra ṣa¨rṣi¨rvaruṣasahasrā
pōduru
Digital edition of SII 40.268 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
